Your Name

About me

CS/engineering student with interests in machine learning, web security, and building things that feel good to use.

Currently working on adapTrunc, exploring whether class separability can serve as a proxy for optimal BERT layer truncation — aiming for faster inference without fine-tuning every layer.

Outside of research, I spend time on security labs, building small web tools, and occasionally writing about what I'm learning.
